title: Luminous Syrian Vegetables Soup
description: A midnight-craving, glassy-jelly soup brimming with umami from spices and tomato paste. Egg-free and hearty, it offers a soothing, vegetable-filled comfort.

ingredients.name: tomato paste
ingredients.notes: Add 1 tbsp lemon juice when finishing

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, cumin, coriander, and cinnamon, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add sliced carrots, diced sweet potato, chopped zucchini, and eggplant, tossing to coat with spices.
Pour in vegetable stock and tomato paste, stirring until the paste dissolves.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Using an immersion blender, blend the soup until smooth and glossy, adding a small amount of stock if needed to reach desired consistency.
Taste and season with salt and pepper; stir in a splash of lemon juice if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs or a drizzle of olive oil, and enjoy the glassy, umami-rich texture.
